home.title: Join A Real Community, Monthly.
home.intro: A welcoming monthly community event for trading card collectors of every age and experience level — hosted by Danny Tagg Collects.
home.sectionTitle: A Club Made For All Collectors
home.sectionIntro: Bring your binder, discover something new and spend time with people who get just as excited about the hobby as you do.
home.featureOneTitle: Buy, Sell and Trade With Confidence
home.featureOneText: With a rigorous vendor selection process, rest assured you will be dealing with the best local vendors from the scene. Buy, Sell and Trade at Antrim Card Club with confidence.
home.featureTwoText: Meet likeminded people who share in your passion for collecting. Make trades, compare collections and make new friends!
home.featureThreeText: New to collecting or years into the hobby? There’s a place for everyone at Antrim Card Club!
home.storyTitle: Built Around The Joy Of The Hobby
home.storyText: Antrim Card Club brings collectors together in a relaxed, friendly space where the cards start the conversation.
home.quote: Community is the heart beat of the hobby

about.title: Collecting Brings Us Together.
about.intro: Antrim Card Club is a welcoming place to share the hobby, grow your collection and meet fellow fans from across the area.
about.mainText: We’re building a genuine local community around collecting. The club creates an easy-going space to browse, buy, sell, trade and connect. Never any pressure. Come and experience the ever growing community for yourself!
about.mainTextTwo: Whether you’re chasing a favourite card, completing a set, collecting for the artwork or just getting started, you’ll find people who share in your passion for collecting!
about.organiserText:
Hi, I am Danny, the founder of Antrim Card Club. A life long Pokemon fan, my goal is trying to create a space I wish existed for me when I was growing up collecting Pokemon. 

I firmly believe that what makes this hobby magical is the community behind it. So Antrim Card Club has been created to highlight this community and create a friendly and welcoming space that collectors and fans of the hobby of all levels can meet, connect and of course chase those grails!
about.galleryIntro: A few moments from the Antrim Card Club community.

gallery.alt: Danny Tagg Collects with a young collector at a card event
gallery.caption: Sharing the hobby with the next generation of collectors.
Antrim Card Club - collect, trade and connect.

contact.title: Let’s talk!
contact.intro: Questions about the club, tickets or getting involved? Send Danny a message.
